welcome.title: Welcome to Ferry
welcome.desc: Ferry runs locally, scanning your AI coding tool sessions and unifying them in one view. No login required, no data uploaded.

guide.step1Title: Switch modules via the navigation rail
guide.step1Body: The fixed rail on the far left switches between Sessions, Migrations, and Snapshots. The rail position and width stay constant; only the middle resource pane and right detail change.
guide.step2Title: Search and filter in the resource pane
guide.step2Body: The pane's title, count, search box, and filter position are consistent across the three modules. Use them to quickly locate by source, time, and directory.
guide.step3Title: Migrate up to here and deliver
guide.step3Body: Long sessions can be truncated at a turn with "Migrate up to here"; preview migration losses before delivering. If verification fails, it rolls back automatically and leaves nothing behind.
